examples: One problem that commuting students sometimes face is their parents' unwillingness to recognize that they're adults.
People's unwillingness to borrow bodes ill for short-term demand.
The lazybones must be aroused from their unwillingness to work.
An unwillingness to sacrifice performance for styling is the new mantra at the 98-year-old company.
Just raising taxes further signals an unwillingness to grapple with the inefficiencies of the French state.
